ValidationRule.description: The Email number is mandatory if it's selected as the prefered method of contact
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL( PreferredMethodOfContact__c, "Email"), ISBLANK( Email ), ISBLANK( PersonalEmail__c ), ISBLANK( TeamEmail__c ), NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: As the Email is the Prefered Method of Contact, at least one Email should be filled
